description: Command YAML frontmatter is missing the required 'name' field; only 'description' is present.
suggested_fix: Add 'name: diff-review' to the frontmatter block.

description: Command YAML frontmatter is missing the required 'name' field; only 'description' is present.
suggested_fix: Add 'name: fact-check' to the frontmatter block.

description: Command YAML frontmatter is missing the required 'name' field; only 'description' is present.
suggested_fix: Add 'name: generate-slides' to the frontmatter block.

description: Command YAML frontmatter is missing the required 'name' field; only 'description' is present.
suggested_fix: Add 'name: generate-visual-plan' to the frontmatter block.

description: Command YAML frontmatter is missing the required 'name' field; only 'description' is present.
suggested_fix: Add 'name: generate-web-diagram' to the frontmatter block.

description: Command YAML frontmatter is missing the required 'name' field; only 'description' is present.
suggested_fix: Add 'name: plan-review' to the frontmatter block.

description: Command YAML frontmatter is missing the required 'name' field; only 'description' is present.
suggested_fix: Add 'name: project-recap' to the frontmatter block.

description: share.md has no YAML frontmatter block at all — the 'name' field is missing. The file is formatted as README documentation rather than a command template.
suggested_fix: Rewrite file as a command template with a frontmatter block containing at minimum 'name: share' and 'description: ...'

description: share.md has no YAML frontmatter block at all — the 'description' field is missing. Without frontmatter, the command will not register correctly.
suggested_fix: Add YAML frontmatter with 'description: Share a visual explainer HTML page via Vercel and return a live URL'

description: Command does not declare an 'allowed-tools' field in frontmatter; tools used (Bash for git/gh, Read) are implicit.
suggested_fix: Add 'allowed-tools: [Bash, Read]' to frontmatter.

description: Command does not declare an 'allowed-tools' field in frontmatter; tools used (Bash, Read, Edit) are implicit.
suggested_fix: Add 'allowed-tools: [Bash, Read, Edit]' to frontmatter.

description: Command does not declare an 'allowed-tools' field in frontmatter.
suggested_fix: Add 'allowed-tools: [Bash, Read, Write]' to frontmatter.

description: Command does not declare an 'allowed-tools' field in frontmatter.
suggested_fix: Add 'allowed-tools: [Bash, Read, Write]' to frontmatter.

description: Command does not declare an 'allowed-tools' field in frontmatter.
suggested_fix: Add 'allowed-tools: [Bash, Read, Write]' to frontmatter.

suggested_fix: Add 'allowed-tools: [Bash, Read, Write]' to frontmatter.

description: Command does not declare an 'allowed-tools' field in frontmatter.
suggested_fix: Add 'allowed-tools: [Bash, Read, Write]' to frontmatter.

description: Command does not declare an 'allowed-tools' field in frontmatter.
suggested_fix: Add 'allowed-tools: [Bash]' to frontmatter.

description: Command takes $@ but provides no fallback behavior when invoked with no arguments; the prompt 'generate a slide deck for: ' is undefined.
suggested_fix: Add an empty-input clause: 'If no topic is provided, ask the user what they would like slides for.'

description: Command takes $@ but provides no fallback behavior when invoked with no arguments.
suggested_fix: Add: 'If no feature description is provided, prompt the user to describe the feature they want to plan.'

description: Command takes $@ but provides no fallback behavior when invoked with no arguments.
suggested_fix: Add: 'If no topic is provided, ask the user what to diagram.'

description: $1 (plan file path) is required but there is no fallback when the argument is omitted.
suggested_fix: Add: 'If no plan file is provided, ask the user for the path to the plan document.'

description: $1 (file-path) is listed as required with no fallback clause in the command template.
suggested_fix: Add: 'If no file path is provided, list HTML files in ~/.agent/diagrams/ and ask the user to select one.'

description: Command has 4+ sequential phases (read references, choose aesthetic, plan narrative arc, generate HTML, write file) described in bold paragraph headers but not numbered; the overall workflow structure is implicit.
suggested_fix: Add a numbered preamble: '1. Read references ... 2. Choose aesthetic ... 3. Plan narrative arc ... 4. Generate HTML ... 5. Write and open.'

description: Vague quantifiers: 'comprehensive' (line 4), 'significant areas of change' (line 38), 'significant design choice' (line 48), 'major feature comparisons' (line 38). Each leaves scope undefined for the agent.
suggested_fix: Replace with concrete criteria, e.g., 'areas with 10+ changed lines' or 'functions with signature changes'.

description: Vague qualifiers: 'stunning' (description), 'distinctive direction' (line 10), 'compelling' (line 14). These are aesthetic adjectives with no measurable threshold.
suggested_fix: Replace 'stunning' with a concrete output property, e.g., 'uses a named preset from slide-patterns.md'.

description: Vague quantifiers: 'comprehensive visual implementation plan' (line 4), 'relevant codebase' (line 16), 'similar features' (line 27).
suggested_fix: Specify 'read all files under the feature's primary directory' rather than 'relevant codebase'.

description: Vague qualifiers: 'beautiful standalone HTML diagram' (description), 'distinctive aesthetic' (line 7), 'genuinely enhance the page' (line 8).
suggested_fix: Replace 'genuinely enhance' with a concrete condition, e.g., 'when the topic involves physical or human elements that Mermaid cannot represent'.

description: Vague quantifiers: 'comprehensive visual project recap' (line 4), 'concise note' (line 54), 'key source files' (line 23).
suggested_fix: Replace 'key source files' with 'entry-point files (index, main, app) and files changed most frequently in the time window'.

description: Vague quantifiers: 'comprehensive visual plan review' (line 4), 'significant area of concern' (line 64).
suggested_fix: Replace 'significant area of concern' with 'any risk with severity medium or higher'.

description: 'key' used ~6 times as a vague filter with no concrete threshold: 'key snippets', 'key metrics', 'key invariants', 'key function names', 'key implementation details', 'key decisions'. Each occurrence leaves qualification criteria undefined for the agent.
suggested_fix: Replace each 'key X' with a measurable criterion, e.g., 'key snippets' → 'the 5-10 lines that illustrate the core logic (already specified nearby — apply that threshold consistently throughout)'.

description: git clone fetches and installs external code from GitHub at runtime; supply-chain compromise of the upstream repo would silently deliver malicious content to all installers.
suggested_fix: Pin to a specific git tag or commit SHA and document the expected checksum.

description: Executes an external vercel-deploy script that publishes the user's HTML file to a public URL without a pre-deploy warning about data exposure.
suggested_fix: Add an explicit public-deployment warning to stdout before the deploy call.

description: rm -rf on $HOME/.pi/agent/skills/visual-explainer removes an entire directory tree on each reinstall; path is hardcoded so risk is limited, but accidental data loss is possible.
suggested_fix: Check if the directory exists and prompt before deletion, or back it up to a temp location first.

description: sed uses | as delimiter while interpolating $SKILL_DIR (derived from $HOME); if $HOME contains |, the sed expression breaks silently.
suggested_fix: Use a delimiter that cannot appear in a filesystem path, e.g., sed -i "s#{{skill_dir}}#$SKILL_DIR#g".

description: Root marketplace plugin.json declares version '1.0.0' while plugins/visual-explainer/.claude-plugin/plugin.json declares '0.6.3'. If the wrapper is expected to mirror the plugin version, this is stale.
suggested_fix: Clarify whether the two versions are intentionally independent; if not, sync the root version to 0.6.3 and update on each release.

description: share.md is formatted as README documentation (markdown headers, code fences, sections) rather than a command template (YAML frontmatter + prompt body). Every other command in the plugin follows the frontmatter template convention.
suggested_fix: Rewrite share.md as a proper command template with YAML frontmatter and a $1-based prompt body, moving the documentation content to a separate README or the SKILL.md sharing section.
